suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify helper file location - AGENTS.md mentions 'e2e/helpers.ts' but project uses 'e2e/test-db-helpers.ts'. Update to reflect actual file name and encourage workers to extend existing helpers rather than creating inline duplicates.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature e2e-profile-comprehensive created inline helpers (registerAndGetToken, clearAllData, createProfile) that duplicate existing functions in e2e/test-db-helpers.ts (registerTestUser, clearTestData, etc.)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document logout button selector pattern for consistency. Recommend using getByRole('button', { name: 'Log out of your account' }) literal string pattern as the standard since the button text is not localized.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: profile-comprehensive.spec.ts uses /Log out/i regex while navigation-smoke.spec.ts uses 'Log out of your account' literal string. Both work but inconsistency could cause confusion.
